Appearances:
Plaintiff Yulan Lai is present.
Attorney Emily Wick appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Ruth A. Martinez is present in pro per.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

This case settled before settlement conference, the trial date of OCT-24-2011 is vacated.
